title: tephroseris aurantiaca
intro: Tephroseris aurantiaca, also known as the Orange Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Tephroseris aurantiaca include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat a range of health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
